title: Summoning Rite Behavior Contract
description: Authoritative contract for the shell bootstrap, Python dispatcher, shared install engine, GUI front end, release binary, and release workflow.

modes.label: Shell bootstrap
required_behaviors: Find or install Python 3 only with explicit user consent.
Prefer release binaries for public piped installs except Linux GUI auto mode.
Download summon.py, summon_core.py, the Grimoire block template, and summon_gui.py when GUI mode is possible.
Verify release checksums before running binaries.
Fall back to Python source when release download, checksum, extraction, or execution fails.
Pass command-line arguments through to the Python dispatcher.

modes.label: Python dispatcher
required_behaviors: Respect --cli and --gui overrides.
Use GUI mode on Windows by default.
Use GUI mode on display-capable Linux/macOS sessions by default.
Use CLI mode when no display server is detected.
Fall back to CLI if GUI import or startup fails.

modes.label: Python CLI
required_behaviors: Check git before install work.
Install or update Arcana.
Optionally discover GitHub/GitLab grimoires from a scope URL.
Optionally clone selected grimoires.
Update the local library for installed grimoires.
Inject supported agent instruction blocks.
Register Arcana and grimoire skills.
Report completion, warnings, and recovery instructions.

modes.label: Python GUI
required_behaviors: Use summon_core discovery, install, library, agent, and skill primitives.
Run long operations in cancelable workers.
Honor persisted agent target and skill-registration settings.
Expose install, manage, settings, diagnostics, and log views.
Fall back before opening the full GUI when GUI dependencies or display support fail.

modes.label: Release binary
required_behaviors: Build grimoire-summon with PyInstaller.
Bundle resources and the canonical Grimoire block template.
Produce platform-specific archives under dist/summon.
Produce a sha256 checksum beside every archive.

modes.label: Release workflow
required_behaviors: Build release assets on Linux, macOS Intel, macOS Apple Silicon, and Windows.
Upload workflow artifacts for review.
Optionally create or update a GitHub Release.
Upload release assets with clobbering enabled for pre-final review.

required_pipeline.label: Discover grimoires from a git host scope

bootstrap_environment.name: ARCANA_REF
bootstrap_environment.purpose: Override the raw-source ref for companion script downloads.

bootstrap_environment.name: GRIMOIRE_SUMMON_BINARY
bootstrap_environment.purpose: Choose release-binary behavior: auto, always, or never.

bootstrap_environment.name: GRIMOIRE_SUMMON_RELEASE_TAG
bootstrap_environment.purpose: Download release assets from a specific tag or latest.

bootstrap_environment.name: GRIMOIRE_SUMMON_DOWNLOAD_ATTEMPTS
bootstrap_environment.purpose: Set release and companion-script download retry count.

bootstrap_environment.name: GRIMOIRE_SUMMON_PY_DEPS
bootstrap_environment.purpose: Set the Python dependency cache used by source GUI mode.

parity_checks.contract: CLI and GUI install paths both perform local library update, agent block injection, and skill registration after Arcana installation.
The shell bootstrap falls back to Python source after release download, checksum, extraction, or binary execution failure.
The dispatcher falls back to CLI when GUI startup fails.
Public piped installs use source mode by default on Linux GUI sessions unless GRIMOIRE_SUMMON_BINARY=always.
